meaning: n.[纺]罗登呢(可防水),罗登呢色(深橄榄色)
examples: Thanks to smart partnerships (like with Loden Dager's fall 2008 runway show), Red Wing has been enjoying a long-overdue revival.
Its reputation as the conscience of the nation, nurtured over six decades among the Loden-coated intellectual classes, never recovered.
